methodology.pivot_rationale: CDC WONDER API blocks county-level grouping for vital statistics; >90% of US counties have suppressed maternal mortality at the county level. Pivoted to validating maternalAccess against perinatal outcomes (infant mortality, low birth weight) which have strong county coverage in CHR&R 2025.
methodology.composite_definition: maternalAccessComposite = mean(maternityCareDesert/3, obProvidersDeficit, obUnitClosure, clamp(distance/30, 0, 1)). Range 0-1.
methodology.outcomes_independent: Both outcomes (LBW, infant mortality) are NOT inputs to the maternalAccess composite. They ARE inputs to the separate `perinatal` HEG component but that component is computed independently from maternalAccess.

low_birth_weight.outcome: Low Birth Weight (% of live births)
